data_source: IPEDS EF Survey 2014-2024 (real data, degree-granting institutions only)

state_growth_rates._source: Blended: 50% AI-sector annual growth (CompTIA 2026 / BLS, derived from 5-yr figures) + 50% IPEDS CS grad enrollment trend (floored at 0). Replaces raw IPEDS-only rates which showed MA declining due to COVID-era grad enrollment dip unrelated to AI demand.

baseline_notes._calibration: Baselines represent ambitious but achievable first-year enrollments for a university launching a dedicated AI program. Validated against: (1) CIP-11 CS master completions (CT 2022: 1,891 statewide, UNH institutional share ~100, AI-specific ~15); (2) comparable program launches (WPI MS AI 2020: ~30 first-year; BU MS AI 2022: ~40-60 first-year); (3) professor success criteria. These are NOT conservative estimates -- they represent the Baseline scenario target.
baseline_notes._international_dominance: International students are primary demand driver for MS AI: 88% of international STEM grad students cite OPT as top priority (IIE 2024). CT AI cybersecurity is a home-program differentiator (NSA CAE designation + TTA 3.0 state backing).
